purpose: Define the WS-8 24-hour standalone replacement soak contract over the curated direct-link workload battery. The runner repeatedly invokes the standalone link/run smoke gate and accepts L3 soak evidence only when a current libfrankenlibc_replace.so produces zero positive-row divergences and zero crashes for the full duration.
required_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-bd-38x82-4-ws8-soak-test cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test ws8_soak_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-bd-38x82-4-ws8-soak-check cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test ws8_soak_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-bd-38x82-4-ws8-soak-clippy cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test ws8_soak_test -- -D warnings
next_safe_action: Run the full evidence lane with a current standalone artifact: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-bd-38x82-4-ws8-soak-cargo WS8_SOAK_DURATION_SECONDS=86400 WS8_SOAK_MINIMUM_ITERATIONS=1 scripts/run_ws8_soak.sh --run. Do not close bd-38x82.4 until the resulting ws8_soak.report.json has status=pass, proof_status=soak_evidence_passed, zero positive divergences, zero crashes, and a current standalone artifact on every iteration.
